description_long: This candle features a tall, slender central shaft with a deep reddish-brown hue, flanked by two geometric, faceted holders at the top and bottom. The holders are octagonal and appear to be made of a dark, matte material, possibly metal or ceramic, providing a sturdy and decorative base and top. The central shaft is slightly tapered and connects the two holders, giving the candle an elegant, hourglass-like silhouette. Small holes or indentations are visible on the surface of the holders, adding a subtle decorative detail. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or upscale sidewalks. The candle does not display any visible flame or wax drips, and the wick is not apparent in any view.
description: A tall, slender candle with a reddish-brown shaft and dark, faceted octagonal holders at the top and bottom, featuring a modern, geometric design. Decorative holes or indentations are present on the holders.
description_view_0: The candle is seen with both octagonal holders clearly visible, showing the hourglass-like taper of the central shaft and the decorative holes on the lower holder.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the symmetry of the holders and the straightness of the central shaft, with the holders appearing more rounded and less faceted.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, both holders and the central shaft are visible, but the lighting and angle highlight the geometric facets and the indentations on the holders.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the holders as more rounded and the shaft as a straight, vertical element, with less emphasis on the decorative details.
